tagline: The same sample page rendered in 71 design languages, so you can compare directions side by side and pick a starting point for your project.
about: Every project starts with a design direction. This gallery renders one sample page in 71 different design languages, drawn from the visual systems of well-known tech brands, so you can compare directions side by side instead of describing what you want from scratch.

The sample content is Thraxel's own services page, and it never changes; only the design does. When a direction fits, note the template name and send it with your project brief. We build your site in that direction.
howItWorks: Browse the categories and open a few templates that catch your eye.
Shortlist one or two template names.
Send them with your project brief and Thraxel builds in that direction.

categories.label: AI & LLM Platforms
categories.description: AI models, voice synthesis, ML inference APIs, agent frameworks, and creative AI tools from frontier labs and open-source providers.

categories.label: Automotive
categories.description: Luxury, performance, and electric vehicle brands with visual languages ranging from stark minimalism to cinematic excess.

categories.label: Backend, Database & DevOps
categories.description: Databases, analytics engines, infrastructure automation, error monitoring, and developer-facing backend platforms.

categories.label: Design & Creative Tools
categories.description: Collaborative design software, visual builders, and creative platforms used by designers and product teams.

categories.label: Developer Tools & IDEs
categories.description: Code editors, deployment platforms, terminals, mobile toolchains, and developer productivity apps built for engineering workflows.

categories.label: E-Commerce & Retail
categories.description: Consumer retail, marketplace, and e-commerce platform brands with visual identities ranging from athletic to premium hospitality.

categories.label: Fintech & Crypto
categories.description: Payment infrastructure, crypto exchanges, digital banking, and global payments network brands with trust-focused or trading-floor visual languages.

categories.label: Media & Consumer Tech
categories.description: Consumer electronics, tech media publications, streaming platforms, hardware makers, and large-scale mobility and telecom brands.

categories.label: Productivity & SaaS
categories.description: Team communication, project management, documentation, scheduling, email, and workflow automation platforms for knowledge workers.

brandBlurbs.runwayml: AI creative-tools platform with an editorial film-festival aesthetic: cinematic dark heroes, paper-white reading bands, single proprietary sans, and pure black pill CTAs.
brandBlurbs.sanity: Headless content platform with a dark-first editorial marketing surface: 112px display type, IBM Plex Mono technical eyebrows, and a single coral-red accent reserved for the highest-priority CTA.
